reviews.review_description:
I have a couple suggestions and it’s a little inspired from another review: 

1. 
      A healing jutsu
2. 
      A chakra gain jutsu (slow obviously)
3. 
      Make barriers edit-able for server hosts


These in my opinion would make the game much more interesting and less tag because when someone is low on chakra it’s either 

A.
     Run and dodge
Or

B. 
     Swing Kumasi around until they kill someone or KOKUSEN

Anyways love your game have a good evening or day or afternoon 

:)

reviews.review_title: Love it! But I have some suggestions
reviews.review_description:
Summary (TL;DR)
(I’ve included this brief summary at the top just in case you don’t feel like reading the long message below!)
I absolutely love this app—it’s literally the only VR ninja game of its kind. However, I have a few feature requests that would make it even better. Here is a quick list of what I’d love to see added, ranked by how badly I want them (10/10 being the highest priority):
• 10/10: Fix the in-game microphone volume (it's currently too quiet).
• 8/10: Increase server sizes to 10 players and add custom team formats.
• 8/10: Add a vote-kick system with a temporary timeout.
• 8/10: Make player ranks visible to others.
• 8/10: Add a progression system for unlocking jutsus/elements.
• 8/10: Add a melee cooldown to prevent dual-wield kunai spamming.
• 8/10: Make thrown kunai damage scale based on distance.
• 7/10: Add a Healing Jutsu.
• 7/10: Add a blocking mechanic for melee attacks.
• 7/10: Nerf Earth Spike speed and add new visibility mechanics, also add charge times to one-shot jutsus.
• 7/10: Add a PvE wave-based survival mode against NPCs.
• 7/10: Double player HP and change the health UI from hearts to a bar.
• 7/10: Limit equipped jutsus to 4 per player for better balance.
• 7/10: Add a new bridge map.
• 6/10: Add new ways to earn coins beyond the daily reward.
• 6/10: Give hosts custom settings for the barrier.
• 5/10: Scale up the Hokage Tower lobby so it feels less cramped.
Detailed Requests & Feedback:
Since I have quite a few ideas, I’ve ranked them below on a scale of 1 to 10 based on how much I want them added.

1. Fix Microphone Volume (10/10)
First of all, please make the in-game microphone volume louder! I can barely hear anyone. The only workaround I’ve found is friending players on Meta and starting a party call.

2. Larger Servers & Custom Teams (8/10)
Please increase the maximum server size to 10 players. Right now, whenever one person leaves a lobby, the match feels irrelevant. If you do add larger servers, it would be great if the host could customize the teams (like 5v5 or 2v2v2v2v2). I know coding complex team setups can be unrealistic, so even just making it a 10-player Free-For-All (FFA) would be perfectly fine and much easier to implement!

3. Vote-Kick System (8/10)
I’d love to see a vote-kick system added. A full report system feels a bit unnecessary, but the game still needs a way to punish toxic users. If someone gets vote-kicked, giving them a 5-minute timeout would be a great way to handle it.

4. Visible Player Ranks (8/10)
It would be awesome if players could see each other's ranks (New Player, Beginner, Intermediate, etc.) next to their names.

5. Progression System (8/10)
Instead of new players having all the jutsus unlocked the second they join, there should be a progression system where you unlock them as you play. A great example is the gacha/spin/rng system from the popular Roblox game Shinobi Life 2. In that game, you roll for elements (Wind, Water, Earth, Fire, Lightning) and equip moves based on what you get. If you added a system where players earn 2 spins for every round they win to get a new element, it would give us a great reason to keep playing! Even if you don't use a spin system, any progression that stops players from having everything on day one would be amazing.

6. Kunai Melee Cooldowns (8/10)
I frequently die to players who just dual-wield kunais and spam hit me with zero repercussions. Please add a cooldown or hit-limit for how many times someone can hit you with a kunai melee attack per second.

7. Distance-Based Kunai Damage (8/10)
It would be a great balancing tweak if thrown kunais did less damage when thrown from super close range, but hit with really high damage if you manage to land a long-distance throw.

8. Healing Jutsu (7/10)
I would love to see a healing jutsu added! From what I found online, the hand signs could be Ox, and then hold Tiger for 1 second. Mechanically, it would be awesome if you could touch a teammate to heal them, or put your hands in the air to heal yourself.

9. Melee Blocking Mechanic (7/10)
Please add a blocking mechanic. It shouldn't block jutsus, but it would be incredibly helpful for blocking standard melee attacks. You could activate it by crossing your arms or by holding a specific hand sign for about 0.3 seconds.

10. Earth Spike Balancing (7/10)
Make the Earth Spike jutsu slower based on range. If you are casting it from super far away, it should take about 5 seconds before the spike actually comes out. Also, adding a visible trail through the ground would help it not feel like it comes out of nowhere.

11. One-Shot Jutsu Nerfs (7/10)
Chakra Overdrive, Swirling Spiral Jutsu, and Lightning Blade are currently one-shot kills. I would appreciate it if you could reduce their damage, or make the user have to hold the last hand sign for 0.5 to 1 second to charge up the jutsu before it can be used.

12. Co-op PvE Mode (7/10)
Please add a new mode where you can fight NPCs with a team. The enemies could progressively get stronger each wave, and the further you go, the more rewards you earn.

13. Increased HP & Health Bar UI (7/10)
Please make the overall HP higher, ideally doubling it (2x). Also, it would be great if you changed the HP display from hearts to a health bar, similar to what is seen in Chakra Sense.

14. Jutsu Equip Limits (7/10)
Similar to the progression idea, it would be great if players could only equip a maximum of 4 jutsus at a time. This would make the combat feel much more balanced.

15. New Map (7/10)
Please add a bridge map!

16. Add Genjutsu (7/10)
Please add a Genjutsu that freezes opponents but make sure charge up time is long and noticeable by other players like it gives a red aura across the map to anyone in proximity and it makes you be able to be seen through walls if your in the radius or something like that

17. New Ways to Earn Coins (6/10)
Please add new ways to earn coins instead of just relying on the 100-coin daily login reward.

18. Custom Barrier Settings (6/10)
Give lobby hosts the ability to change the barrier settings. For example, let the host decide if the barrier instantly kills you, or if it just pushes you back into the safe zone. It would also be nice to adjust how fast the barrier closes in, or toggle it off completely.

19. Bigger Hokage Tower Lobby (5/10)
Finally, when you join a lobby, the Hokage Tower feels a bit cramped. You don’t have to add any new details or change the layout—just scaling the room up a bit would make a huge difference.

reviews.review_title: Quest two issues and hand sign issues
reviews.review_description: I swear to God playing this on quest two with the big tracking rings feels like being crippled, half of the time when I do the certain hand sign, it does it, undoes it, and then redoes it all in the span of a millisecond, causing the jutsu pattern to have to be restarted. It's genuinely unplayable matchmaking as well because there are only 5 different skill levels from new player to master. This game needs serious recoding and just an overall redo of the game.
